title: Dashboard with multiple LiveComponents + send_update coordination
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/admin_dashboard_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AdminDashboardLive). It owns @filter state and hosts three LiveComponents: <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.FilterBar} id="filter" filter={@filter} />, <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.StatsPanel} id="stats" filter={@filter} />, <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.RecentActivity} id="activity" filter={@filter} />. The FilterBar must use send(self(), {:filter_changed, value}) (or update via send_update). The LiveView updates @filter in a handle_info({:filter_changed, value}, socket) clause, which causes the stats and activity components to re-render with the new filter.
tier_rationale: Requires correct parent-child coordination with single source of truth on the parent.
